latest_articles.title: War criminal Mladic close to death, say lawyers asking judge for jail release
latest_articles.summary: Mladic, 84, was jailed for life for genocide, war crimes and crimes against humanity during the Bosnian war in 1992-95.
latest_articles.evidence: Mladic was jailed for life for genocide, war crimes

latest_articles.title: 30 Years Before Iran Op, A Pilot Who Survived Behind Enemy Lines For Days
latest_articles.summary: In 1995, US pilot Scott O'Grady survived for six days after his F-16 was shot down over Bosnia
latest_articles.evidence: F-16 was shot down over Bosnia

latest_articles.title: Philippe Morillon, General Who Made Fateful Protection Promise, Dies at 90
latest_articles.summary: “I will never abandon you,” he told residents of Srebrenica amid sectarian armed conflict in Bosnia. The town later suffered the worst massacre in Europe since World War II.
latest_articles.evidence: town later suffered the worst massacre in Europe since World War II
